    logline: 'A child and an otter guardian follow drifting lanterns across the harbor to return each light before bedtime.'
  },
  selected_character_sheet: null,
  selected_story_setup: {
    id: 'setup-1',
    revision_number: 1,
    target_word_count: 1500,
    target_runtime_minutes: 12,
    chapter_count: 4,
    chapter_style: 'short'
  },
  active_composition_job: null,
  active_audio_job: null,
  latest_story_asset: null,
  latest_audio_asset: null
}

const browser = await puppeteer.launch({
  headless: true,
  executablePath: process.env.PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH,
  args: ['--no-sandbox', '--disable-setuid-sandbox']
})

try {
  const page = await browser.newPage()
  await page.setRequestInterception(true)
  page.on('request', async (request) => {
    const url = request.url()
    if (url.endsWith('/api/hello')) {
      await request.respond({ status: 200, contentType: 'application/json', body: JSON.stringify({ message: 'Hello from mocked backend.' }) })
      return
    }
    if (url.includes('/api/v1/sessions/moonlit-harbor')) {
      await request.respond({ status: 200, contentType: 'application/json', body: JSON.stringify(sampleSnapshot) })
      return
    }
    await request.continue()
  })

  await page.setViewport({ width: 390, height: 844 })
  await page.goto('http://frontend:8566/sessions/moonlit-harbor', { waitUntil: 'networkidle2', timeout: 30000 })
  await page.waitForSelector('[data-testid=\"workspace-route\"]', { visible: true })
  await page.waitForFunction(() => document.body.innerText.includes('Live feed idle'))
  await page.evaluate(() => {
    document.querySelector('.workspace-topbar')?.scrollIntoView({ block: 'start' })
  })
  await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 200))
  const mobilePath = path.join(outputDir, 'prompt-29-session-workspace-mobile.png')
  await page.screenshot({ path: mobilePath, fullPage: false })
  console.log('Saved mobile screenshot to ' + mobilePath)
} finally {
  await browser.close()
}
EOF"

## Agent Message

- Time: `2026-04-01T04:21:40-07:00`
- Prompt: `29 — Frontend WebSocket Client Skeleton` (30/100)
- Task event: `247`
- Summary: Implemented the websocket client skeleton end to end and checkpointed it in commit `0dfb491` (`feat(prompt-29): frontend websocket client skeleton`). The frontend now has a typed realtime contract/parser, a reconnecting session-scoped we...

### Full Text

    Implemented the websocket client skeleton end to end and checkpointed it in commit `0dfb491` (`feat(prompt-29): frontend websocket client skeleton`). The frontend now has a typed realtime contract/parser, a reconnecting session-scoped websocket client, runtime-store event reduction that merges live stage/chat/progress updates into the current session snapshot, and a visible live-status card in the workspace header. The main wiring lives in [sessionRealtimeClient.ts](/Users/kevin/code/storyteller/frontend/src/features/session/live/sessionRealtimeClient.ts), [sessionRuntimeStore.ts](/Users/kevin/code/storyteller/frontend/src/features/session/sessionRuntimeStore.ts), and [SessionWorkspacePage.tsx](/Users/kevin/code/storyteller/frontend/src/pages/session/SessionWorkspacePage.tsx).

    Verification passed with `npm run lint`, `npm test` (`11` files, `36` tests), `npm run build`, and `npm run format:check`. Browser QA was also completed with mocked API responses inside the running compose `browser` container because the local compose backend currently exits on an existing `secrets.yaml` validation issue unrelated to this prompt. Screenshots are at [prompt-29-session-workspace-desktop.png](/Users/kevin/code/storyteller/.artifacts/webapp-qa/prompt-29-session-workspace-desktop.png) and [prompt-29-session-workspace-mobile.png](/Users/kevin/code/storyteller/.artifacts/webapp-qa/prompt-29-session-workspace-mobile.png). The required reviewer summary was written last to [29-frontend-websocket-client-skeleton.summary.md](/Users/kevin/code/storyteller/prompts/29-frontend-websocket-client-skeleton.summary.md).
